label: Counter
summary: The sunken odometer shell for a hit counter; static digits work today, the hit-counter widget populates it later.
era: The odometer hit counter at the foot of the page, proudly proving 4,096 visitors since 1998.

classes.name: rs-counter
classes.role: sunken bezel, black bg, odometer digits

a11y: One visually hidden sentence carries the count; the odometer digits are aria-hidden decoration. Never a live region.
